title: Routes config AppKey contract refresh lane precheck
delta_summary: switches manager and credential_store access to typed AppKey constants
prevents aiohttp string-key warning drift for routes_config hot-swap and key resolution paths

risk_signals.evidence: request.app access path changed for manager/credential store
risk_signals.impact: mis-bound AppKeys could break llm config read/update endpoints

decision_gate: keep_local acceptable if model-catalog/provider bundles remain green with typed AppKey access
